customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high motivation. Karen is the initiator — she submitted the inquiry before Eric got around to it. Both are retired, both are available, and Karen volunteered bill pain unprompted twice. No resistance to the appointment concept. Primary risk is logistical (accessibility, email confirmation), not motivational.
unresolved_concerns: Detached garage (built 2025, no existing electrical connection) — Karen wants solar to power the garage. This is a non-standard scoping scenario the closer needs to address; the setter did not scope it.
Bill spike to $700/month for three consecutive months — Karen mentioned this but doesn't know the cause. The closer should be prepared to address this as part of the design conversation.

Credit qualifier confirmation is ambiguous — the exchange at 05:06 was conducted through a relay service and the transcript is garbled. Closer should reconfirm credit standing at the start of the appointment.
sensitive_topics_raised: Karen and Eric are both deaf and communicate through a relay service — the closer must be prepared for this communication channel before the Saturday call begins.

Karen submitted the inquiry before Eric was aware of it — Eric has been independently looking for a solar contact. Household is aligned on solar; confirm Eric is present and aware of the Saturday appointment.
exact_promises_rep_made: Confirmation email to be sent to klynspanbauer@gmail.com (Karen's address — NOT eric@gmail.com which was the lead record address).
Relay-service communication need to be noted for the appointment.
Specialist will review the design covering both the house and the detached garage.
No upfront out-of-pocket cost; program replaces the Dominion bill with a cheaper solar payment.
closer_should_know: Karen and Eric are both deaf and have been communicating through a relay service — the closer must confirm the communication channel and have a plan for the appointment before dialing Saturday at 09:30. Confirm Eric is present. Verify the confirmation email reached Karen's address (klynspanbauer@gmail.com), not the lead record address (eric@gmail.com). The garage scoping question (off-grid structure, new construction 2025) will come up early — be prepared to address it without over-promising on the setter's behalf.
